title: Michael Tribolet
compiled_truth: Michael Tribolet is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1980-01-01 to 2002-05-06), Michael Tribolet sent 163 and received 1116 emails, totalling 1279 interactions. Top correspondents: [Jeff Dasovich](people/jeff-dasovich) (99), [Lisa Mellencamp](people/lisa-mellencamp) (41), [Harry Kingerski](people/harry-kingerski) (39), [James Steffes](people/james-steffes) (39), [Susan Mara](people/susan-mara) (37). Mailbox folders observed: _americas, california_issues, california_pg_e_bankruptcy, deleted_items, ees_neg_ctc, inbox.
